prompt: 不要用 product-delivery-skill-chain，直接用 prd-task-archiver 基于 docs/refund-prd.md 拆任务并保存 tasks.md。
assertions: Does not invoke product-delivery-skill-chain because the user explicitly requested the downstream skill directly.
Routes directly to prd-task-archiver if the required PRD exists or asks for the PRD if missing.
Does not create or update delivery-chain-status.md.
Does not force technical design, audit standards, implementation, or review into this single-skill request.
